changes.description: New module for .cnogo/run.json coordination ledger. Provides generate_run_id(), load/save/create/update_ledger() with atomic writes.
New module implementing deterministic leader-only closure algorithm. Bottom-up: TASK (verify_and_close) -> PLAN (ready_to_close -> close) -> EPIC.
Added forwarding functions and __all__ entries for ledger and reconciliation modules.
Rewrote implement action with guaranteed try/finally lifecycle, run ledger creation, leader reconciliation, and TeamDelete in finally block.
